{{Missing Info|specifics=This page is being formatted by the wiki team. Thank you for your patience as we find the best page structure. Reach out to us on Discord to help!}}

==Dragon Moon==
{| class="wikitable"
!Pedestal
!colspan="2"|Task
!Rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Left
|Dig-Mine
|Dig out all 7 Mines on tiles: 13; 22; 31; 40; 45; 62; 75
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Right
|Clear Domain
|Clear Outside Crystal Palace; Reception Area; Entertainment Area; VIP Area; Manager Office; Hidden Corridor; Confidential Lab
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Left
|Eliminate Generals
|Eliminate Baxia; Pixiu; Fuxi; Pulao; Qiuniu; Yazi
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Right
|Explore Domain
|Investigate the tiles within Outside Crystal Palace; Reception Area; Entertainment Area; VIP Area; Manager Office; Hidden Corridor; Confidential Lab
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Back-Middle
|Cathay Dragon God
|Defeat Jaden, Fake Jaden's Head and Secret of Jaden
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +5
|}

===Moon Shop===
{|class="wikitable"
!Item
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}}
!Quantity Available
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}}{{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}}{{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}}{{Retext|T3 Jaden Core|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Purple Coating, +120|purple}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +150k}}
|3||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2d}}
|4||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner, +1000|orange}}
|5||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Crystal of Will}}{{Gearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|6||1
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cathay Nebula Pack|orange}} ({{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +1k}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}})
|7||1
|}

==Reserach Manual Shop (Tile 92)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Product
!Cost
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Manual, +10}}
|22.5k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Manual, +10}}
|22.5k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Manual, +10}}
|22.5k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Manual, +10}}
|22.5k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual, +10}}
|22.5k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Manual, +10}}
|22.5k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|50k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-}

==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Minion Battle
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|-
|Store
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name
!Notes
!Rewards
|-
|1
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Greeter
|RUSH weakness: 2.200.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}}T1 Jaden Scale +3
|-
|2
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Greeter
|RUSH weakness: 2.200.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}}T1 Jaden Horn +3
|-
|rowspan="2"|3
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Greeter
|RUSH weakness: 2.230.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Guest Drum
|Beat the Guest Drum (Need {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, 20k}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Engineering Printing Supply, +50}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|4
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Casino Security
|RUSH weakness: 2.2300.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}}T1 Jaden Scale +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Fortune Flag
|Chop down the Flag!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|5
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Baxia
|RUSH weakness: 2.260.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}}T1 Jaden Horn +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|General Baxia
|ATK: 39.585; DEF: 26.390; HP: 876.121; AFFCT: 66.950<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Stele
|Smash the Stele!
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +500}}
|-
|6
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|REceptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.260.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +3
|-
|7
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Receptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.290.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}}T1 Jaden Scale +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|8
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Clerk
|RUSH weakness: 2.290.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} T1 Jaden Horn +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Stored Security Box
|Enter password (6428)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +1}}
|-
|9
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Receptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.320.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +4
|-
|10
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Receptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.320.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} T1 Jaden Scale +4
|-
|11
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Receptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.350.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} T1 Jaden Horn +4
|-
|rowspan="3"|12
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)|Pawn Shop Owner
|RUSH weakness: 2.350.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}}T1 Jaden Core +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)|Pawn Shop
|Display Orange Relic: At least tier 6
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +1|orange}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Pawn Shop
|Display Awakened Relic: Orange Relic
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +1|orange}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|13
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 2.380.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} T1 Jaden Scale +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 10h 54min 32sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +360}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +48|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|14
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Money Shop Owner
|RUSH weakness: 2.420.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} T1 Jaden Horn +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Money Shop
|Exchange for cash: {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin, 100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}
|-
|15
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lead Greeter
|RUSH weakness: 2.380.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|16
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Receptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.420.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} T1 Jaden Scale +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Snack Area
|Get in line!
|Donkey Burger +10
|-
|17
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Receptionist
|RUSH weakness: 2.450.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} T1 Jaden Horn +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|18
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pixiu
|RUSH weakness: 2.500.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|General Pixiu
|ATK: 40.635; DEF: 27.090; HP: 923.613; AFFCT: 67.925<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|19
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.480.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} T1 Jaden Scale +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|20
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.5100.000
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} T1 Jaden Horn +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Mahjong Table
|Search the table
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|21
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Security Chief
|RUSH weakness: 2.540.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +4
|-
|rowspan="2"|22
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 2.540.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} T1 Jaden Scale +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 10h 54min 32sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin, +360}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map,+360}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +3}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|23
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.570.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} T1 Jaden Horn +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Mahjong Table
|Search the table
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Gvent Guru
|ATK: 41.685; DEF: 35.730; HP: 844.915; AFFCT: 68.950<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tetrabiblos|blue}} Fragment +10
|-
|rowspan="2"|24
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.600.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} T1 Jaden Core +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Mahjong Table
|Search the table
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|25
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Fuxi
|RUSH weakness: 2.700.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +3|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Quizman
|Correct answers in order: B, C, A, B, C
|{{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Orange, +3|CIV|orange}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|26
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.480.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +3|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Mahjong Table
|Search the table
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|27
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.510.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +3|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|28
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.570.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +3|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Mahjong Table
|Search the table
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +10k}}
|-
|29
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Gambler
|RUSH weakness: 2.600.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +3|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|30
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pulao
|RUSH weakness: 2.680.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +3|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|General Pulao
|ATK: 42.788; DEF: 28.525; HP: 1.000.470; AFFCT: 69.925<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|31
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 2.660.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +3|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 14h 32min 44sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +480}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +16}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +4}}
|-
|32
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Doorkeeper
|RUSH weakness: 2.660.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +3|green}}
|-
|33
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Celestial Orchestra
|RUSH weakness: 2.690.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +3|green}}
|-
|34
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Celestial Orchestra
|RUSH weakness: 2.690.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +4|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|35
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Warden
|RUSH weakness: 2.720.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|A Set of Keys
|Pick up the keys: 3.8M Power required
|{{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key, +3}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|36
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Guard
|RUSH weakness: 2.780.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)|Cage
|Open it: Use 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +2|orange}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|37
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Guard
|RUSH weakness: 2.820.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Cage
|Open it: Use 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Fantasy Seven
|Complete 7 trials
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +40|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|38
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Guard
|RUSH weakness: 2.8200.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Cage
|Open it: Use 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +10|orange}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|39
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Waiter
|RUSH weakness: 2.720.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Cafeteria
|Grab Food!
|Yangzhou Fried Rice +10
|-
|rowspan="2"|40
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 2.750.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--Green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 14h 32min 44sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +480}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +8|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +4}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|41
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Bath Technician
|RUSH weakness: 2.750.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Special Sumo Training
|ATK: 44.552; DEF: 25.458; HP: 1.302.798; AFFCT: 71.485<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|42
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Celestial Orchestra
|RUSH weakness: 2.780.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +4|green}}
|-
|43
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Celestial Orchestra
|RUSH weakness: 2.850.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +4|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|44
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Qiuniu
|RUSH weakness: 2.900.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Qiuniu
|ATK: 45.434; DEF: 30.289; HP: 1.070.800; AFFCT: 72.265<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|45
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 2.880.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 18h 10min 54sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +600}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|46
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Servant
|RUSH weakness: 2.910.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Scale, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow)|God of Wealth - Guan Yu
|Worship General Guan Yu: 4M Power required
|Lottery Password ({{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}})<br>{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +90k}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|47
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Servant
|RUSH weakness: 2.940.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Horn, +4|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|God of Wealth - Bigan
|Worship Prince Bigan: 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Incense|orange}} required
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +3|orange}}
|-
|48
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Justice Banner
|RUSH weakness: 2.970.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T2 Jaden Core, +4|green}}
|-
|49
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Benevolence Banner
|RUSH weakness: 3.000.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +3|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|50
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Servant
|RUSH weakness: 2.880.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow)"|God of Wealth - Gongming
|Worship the general: 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Incense|orange}} required
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin, +900}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|51
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Servant
|RUSH weakness: 2.910.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="backgroundcolor:var(--yellow-bg)"|God of Wealth - Fan Li
|Worship Minister Fan Li: 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Incense|orange}} required
|{{RewardIconWithText|Star Coin, +8k}}
|-
|52
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Loyalty Banner
|RUSH weakness: 2.940.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +3|blue}}
|-
|53
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Filial Piety Banner
|RUSH weakness: 2.970.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +3|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|54
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Dragon God
|RUSH weakness: 3.200.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|General Yazi
|ATK: 46.788; DEF: 31.192; HP: 1.150614; AFFCT: 75.050<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fake Jaden's Head|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|55
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.030.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +3|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Identification System
|Display the "Super Gene Expert" avatar
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest, +50}}
|-
|56
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.030.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Horn Horn, +3|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|57
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.060.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scrolls}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scrolls, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Infoabout Baxia)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +3k}}
|-
|58
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.060.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +3|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|59
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.090.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Pixiu)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +3k)
|-
|rowspan="2"|60
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.120.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +3|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Wormhole Device
|Take the Wormhole COre
|{{RewardIconWithText|Adv. Rocket Blueprint}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wormhole Device}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +4h}}
|-
|61
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.120.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +4|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|62
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 3.090.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +4|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 18h 10min 54sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +1.200}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +600}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +5}}
|-
|63
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.150.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +4|blue}}
|-
|64
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Researh Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.150.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +4|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|65
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.180.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +4|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Suanni
|ATK: 47.250; DEF: 31.500; HP: 1.118.325; AFFCT: 74825<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Crimson Dragon Scale, +1|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Suanni)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +3k}}
|-
|66
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.220.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +4|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|67
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.180.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +4|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Fuxi)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, +3k}}
|-
|68
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.250.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +4|blue}}
|-
|69
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.280.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +4|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|70
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.370.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Scale, +4|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Taotie
|ATK: 48.405; DEF: 32.270; HP: 1.148.269; AFFCT: 75.800<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mecha Gut, +1|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Taotie)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Angel Cell, 3k}}
|-
|71
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.340.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Horn, +4|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|72
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.310.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T3 Jaden Core, +4|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Pulao)
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Pulao II, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +3k}}
|-
|73
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.400.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +3|purple}}
|-
|74
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.460.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +3|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|75
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Miner
|RUSH weakness: 3.430.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +3|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine
|Mining duration: 21h 49min 02sec; requirement: 40x T3+ minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner, +1440}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +720}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Bead Box, +5}}
|-
|76
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.490.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +3|purple}}
|-
|77
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.520.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +3|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|78
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.620.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +3|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Bi'an
|ATK: 49.613; DEF: 33.075; HP: 1.178.744; AFFCT: 76775<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Crystalized Rib, +1|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Bi'an)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mutant Cell, +3k}}
|-
|79
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.580.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +3|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|80
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.550.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +3|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Qiuniu)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell, +3k}}
|-
|81
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.650.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +3|purple}}
|-
|82
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.680.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +4|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|83
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.770.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Koi Dragon
|ATK: 50.216, DEF: 43.043, HP: 1.119.305, AFFCT: 77263<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%!
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest, +50}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Koi Dragon)
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Koi Dragon, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell, +3k}}
|-
|84
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.740.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +4|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|85
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.710.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Yazi9
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Yazi II, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +3k}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|86
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.860.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Bahamud
|ATK: 57.000, DEF: 37.000, HP: 1.572.494, AFFCT: 79625<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Taichi Fish, +100}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Bahamud)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +3k}}
|-
|87
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.830.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +4|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|88
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.800.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Defective Dragon
|ATK: 54.810; DEF: 36.540; HP: 1.401.228; AFFCT: 80.870<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Broken Dragon's Horn|orange}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Check them! (Info about Modulated Divine Dragon)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Demon Cell, +3k}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|89
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Dragon God's Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.890.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Dragon God's Guard
|ATK: 51.545; DEF: 34.363; HP: 1.487.062; AFFCT: 78.335<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Inhibition Device|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Mahjong Trooper|orange|Robots}}
|-
|90
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.920.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +4|purple}}
|-
|91
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 3.950.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +4|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|92
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Biochem Researcher
|RUSH weakness: 3.980.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|Super Gene Expert
|Opens Research Manual Shop
|
|-
|93
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.020.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +4|purple}}
|-
|94
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.050.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +4|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|95
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Beast God's Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.080.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Beast God's Guard
|ATK: 52.028; DEF: 34.685; HP: 1.511.057; AFFCT: 78.725<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +5h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|96
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|War God's Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.110.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|War God's Guard
|ATK: 52.511; DEF: 35.007; HP: 1.535.075; AFFCT: 79.115<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +5h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|97
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Arcane God's Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.170.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Scale}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Scale, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Arcane God's Guard
|ATK: 52.994; DEF: 35.329; HP: 1.559.117; AFFCT: 79505<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +5h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|98
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Sword God's Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.140.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Horn}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Horn, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Sword God's Guard
|ATK: 53.498; DEF: 35.665; HP: 1.578.751; AFFCT: 79.895<br>Special stats: HIT +50; Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +5h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|99
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Research Facility Guard
|RUSH weakness: 4.200.000 Power
|{{RewardIcon|Jaden Core}} {{Retext|T4 Jaden Core, +4|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Dragon Hub
|Unlocked after 4 "God's Guard" nodes completed
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|-
|100
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Jaden Cultivation Pod
|RUSH weakness: 4.300.000 Power
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest,+100}}
|-
|}
<!--
==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name (first encounter)
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward (first encounter)
!Name (second encounter)
!Reward (second encounter)
!Notes
|-
|1
|Greeter
|2,200,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|2
|Greeter
|2,200,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|3
|Greeter
|2,230,000
|T1 Jaden Core +3
|Guest Drum
|
|Display 20k W-tads (must have that amount on hand, but they are not consumed)
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|4
|Casino Security
|2,230,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +3
|Fortune Flag
|Wood +500
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|5
|Baxia
|2,260,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +3
|Baxia (AFFCT 66,900)
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter: Stele rewards Stone +500
|-
|6
|Receptionist
|2,260,000
|T1 Jaden Core +3
|
|
|
|-
|7
|Receptionist
|2,290,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|8
|Receptionist
|2,290,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +4
|Stored Security Box
|Lottery Ticket +5, Bead Box +1
|Code is 6428
|-
|9
|Receptionist
|2,320,000
|T1 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|10
|Receptionist
|2,320,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|11
|Receptionist
|2,350,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|12
|Pawn Shop Staff
|2,350,000
|T1 Jaden Core +4
|Pawn Shop (display Orange relic: at least tier 6)
|Wish Coin +1 the first time
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Third encounter: display awakened Orange relic rewards: Wish Coin +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|13
|Miner
|2,380,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +4
|Mine
|Cathay Treasure Map +360, Expert Scroll +40, Bead Box +3
|Requires any type T3 minion: 40/40
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|14
|Money Shop Worker
|2,420,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +4
|Money Shop
|W-tads +300
|Exchange for cash: 100/100 {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}}
|-
|15
|Receptionist
|2,380,000
|T1 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|16
|Receptionist
|2,420,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +4
|Snack Area
|Donkey Burger +10
|
|-
|17
|Receptionist
|2,450,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|18???
|Pixiu
|2,500,000
|T1 Jaden Core +4
|General Pixiu
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 67,875
|-
|19
|Gambler
|2,480,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|20
|Gambler
|2,510,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +4
|Mahjong Table
|B-tads +10k
|
|-
|21
|Security Chief
|2,540,000
|T1 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|22
|Miner
|2,540,000
|T1 Jaden Scale +4
|Mine
|Fissure Coin +360, Cathay Treasure Map +360, Bead Box +3
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|23
|Gambler
|2,570,000
|T1 Jaden Horn +4
|Mahjong Table
|B-tads +10k
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Third encounter: Gvent Guru (AFFCT 68,850) rewards [[Tetrabiblos]] fragments +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|24
|Gambler
|2,600,000
|T1 Jaden Core +4
|Mahjong Table
|B-tads +10k
|
|-
|25???
|Gambler
|2,510,000
|T2 Jaden Core +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|26
|Gambler
|2,480,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +3
|Mahjong Table
|B-tads +10k
|
|-
|27
|Gambler
|2,510,000
|T2 Jaden Core +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|28
|Gambler
|2,570,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +3
|Mahjong Table
|B-tads +10k
|
|-
|29
|Gambler
|2,600,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|30
|Pulao
|2,680,000
|T2 Jaden Core +3
|Pulao
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 69,725
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|???
|Fuxi
|2,700,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +3
|Quizman
|Orange Fungus +3
|Answers: B, C, A, B, C
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|31
|Miner
|2,660,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +3
|Mine
|Cathay Treasure Map +480, Lottery Ticket +16, Bead Box +4
|
|-
|32
|Doorkeeper
|2,660,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|33
|Celestial Orchestra
|2,690,000
|T2 Jaden Core +3
|
|
|
|-
|34
|Celestial Orchestra
|2,690,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|35
|Warden
|2,720,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +4
|A Set of Keys
|{{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key, +3}}
|Requires 3.8M Power
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|36
|Guard
|2,780,000
|T2 Jaden Core +4
|Cage
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +2|orange}}
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|37???
|Guard
|2,820,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +4
|Cage
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Third encounter: Fantasy Seven. Rewards: 5x Expert Scroll for each of 7 battles.
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|38
|Guard
|2,820,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +4
|Cage
|Lottery Ticket +10
|Requires 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|39
|Waiter
|2,720,000
|T2 Jaden Core +4
|Cafeteria
|Yangzhou Fried Rice +10
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|40
|Miner
|2,750,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +4
|Mine
|Cathay Treasure Map +480, Wish Coin +8, Bead Box +4
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|41
|Bath Technician
|2,750,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +4
|Nissan
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 71,285
|-
|42
|Celestial Orchestra
|2,780,000
|T2 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|43
|Celestial Orchestra
|2,850,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|44???
|Qiuniu
|2,900,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +4
|Qiuniu
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 72,065
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|45
|Miner
|2,880,000
|T2 Jaden Core +4
|Mine
|Cathay Treasure Map +600<br>Bead Box +5<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|46
|Servant
|2,910,000
|T2 Jaden Scale +4
|God of Wealth - Guan Yu
|Lottery Ticket +3, B-tads +90k
|Requires 4M Power
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|47
|Servant
|2,940,000
|T2 Jaden Horn +4
|God of Wealth - Bigan
|Wish Coin +3
|Requires 1x [[Incense]]
|-
|48
|Justice Banner
|2,970,000
|T2 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|49
|Benevolence Banner
|3,000,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|50
|Servant
|2,880,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +3
|God of Wealth - Gongming
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin, +900}}
|Requires 1x [[Incense]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|51
|Servant
|2,910,000
|T3 Jaden Core +3
|God of Wealth - Fan Li
|Star Coin +8,000
|Requires 1x [[Incense]]
|-
|52
|Loyalty Banner
|2,940,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|53
|Filial Piety Banner
|2,970,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|54???
|Dragon God
|3,200,000
|T3 Jaden Core +3
|General Yazi
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fake Jaden's Head}}
|AFFCT 74,850
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|55
|Research Facility Guard
|???
|T3 Jaden Scale +3
|Identification System
|Evolution Chest +50
|Requires Combat Gene Expert avatar
|-
|56
|Research Facility Guard
|3,030,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|57
|Biochem Researcher
|3,060,000
|T3 Jaden Core +3
|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Zombie Cell +3,000
|
|-
|58
|Biochem Researcher
|3,060,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|59
|Research Facility Guard
|3,090,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +3
|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Demon Cell +3,000
|



|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|60
|Research Facility Guard
|3,120,000
|T3 Jaden Core +3
|Wormhole Device
|Adv. Rocket Blueprint, Wormhole Device, 4h Refine Speedup
|
|-
|61
|Biochem Researcher
|3,120,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|62
|Miner
|3,090,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +4
|Mine
|Evolution Chest +1,200, Cathay Treasure Map +600, Bead Box +5
|
|-
|63
|Biochem Researcher
|3,150,000
|T3 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|64
|Research Facility Guard
|3,150,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|65
|Research Facility Guard
|3,180,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +4
|Suanni (AFFCT 74,625)
|Crimson Dragon Scale [[Organs|organ]]
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter "Vacant Cultivation Chamber" rewards Demon Cell +3,000
|-
|66
|Biochem Researcher
|3,220,000
|T3 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|67
|Biochem Researcher
|3,180,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +4
|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Angel Cell +3,000
|
|-
|68
|Research Facility Guard
|3,250,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +4
|
|
|
|-
|69
|Research Facility Guard
|3,280,000
|T3 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|70
|Biochem Researcher
|3,370,000
|T3 Jaden Scale +4
|Taotie (AFFCT 75,600)
|Mecha Gut [[Organs|organ]]
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter "Vacant Cultivation Chamber" rewards Angel Cell +3,000
|-
|71
|Biochem Researcher
|3,340,000
|T3 Jaden Horn +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|72
|Research Facility Guard
|3,310,000
|T3 Jaden Core +4
|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Mutant Cell +3,000, Pulao II [[Gene Simulation]]
|
|-
|73
|Research Facility Guard
|3,400,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|74
|Biochem Researcher
|3,460,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|75
|Miner
|3,430,000
|T4 Jaden Core +3
|???
|???
|
|-
|76
|Biochem Researcher
|3,490,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|77
|Research Facility Guard
|3,520,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|78
|Research Facility Guard
|3,620,000
|T4 Jaden Core +3
|Bi'an (AFFCT 76,575)
|[[Crystalized Rib]] (shell)
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter "Vacant Cultivation Chamber" rewards Mutant Cell +3,000
|-
|79
|Biochem Researcher
|3,580,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|80
|Biochem Researcher
|3,550,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +3
|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Mecha Cell +3,000
|
|-
|81
|Research Facility Guard
|3,650,000
|T4 Jaden Core +3
|
|
|
|-
|82
|Research Facility Guard
|3,680,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|83
|Biochem Researcher
|3,770,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +4
|Koi Dragon (AFFCT 77,063)
|
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter "Vacant Cultivation Chamber" rewards Demon Cell +3,000 and [[Gene_Simulation#Gene_Simulation_Trials|Koi Dragon gene sim]]
|-
|84
|Biochem Researcher
|3,740,000
|T4 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|85
|Research Facility Guard
|3,710,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +4
|Vacant Cultivation Chamber
|Zombie Cell +3,000, Yazi II [[Gene Simulation]]
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|86
|Research Facility Guard
|3,860,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +4
|Bahamud (AFFCT 79,425)
|Taichi Fish +100
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter "Vacant Cultivation Chamber" rewards Zombie Cell +3,000
|-
|87
|Biochem Researcher
|3,830,000
|T4 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|88
|Biochem Researcher
|3,800,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +4
|Defective Dragon (AFFCT 80,670)
|Broken Dragon's Horn (offer it at the [[Altar]] - 2 days)
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Third encounter "Vacant Cultivation Chamber" rewards Demon Cell +3,000
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|89
|Dragon God's Guard
|3,890,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +4
|Dragon God's Guard
|[[Inhibition Device]], Mahjong Trooper (robot)
|AFFCT 78,135
|-
|90
|Research Facility Guard
|3,920,000
|T4 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|91
|Research Facility Guard
|3,950,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|92
|Biochem Researcher
|3,980,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +4
|Super Gene Expert
|
|Sells 10 of each Manual and 1 {{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} for B-tads
|-
|93
|Biochem Researcher
|4,020,000
|T4 Jaden Core +4
|
|
|
|-
|94
|Research Facility Guard
|4,050,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +4
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|95
|Beast God's Guard
|4,080,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +4
|Beast God's Guard
|5h Gene Speedup<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 78,525
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|96
|War God's Guard
|4,110,000
|T4 Jaden Core +4
|War God's Guard
|5h Gene Speedup<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 78,915
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|97
|Arcane God's Guard
|4,170,000
|T4 Jaden Scale +4
|Arcane God's Guard
|5h Gene Speedup<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 79,305
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|98
|Sword God's Guard
|4,140,000
|T4 Jaden Horn +4
|Sword God's Guard
|5h Gene Speedup<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 79,695
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|99
|Research Facility Guard
|4,200,000
|T4 Jaden Core +4
|Dragoness Hub
|{{RewardIconWithText|Dragon Moon}} +1
|AFFCT 81,850; can only be fought after the four "God's Guard" nodes are complete
|-
|100
|Jaden Cultivation Pod
|4,300,000
|Evolution Chest +100
|
|
|
|}
-->
[[Category:Cathay Domain]]
